name: do-not-trigger-on-single-commit
query: commit and push the changes I just made
expected_behavior: Invokes git-ship instead (the sibling skill for single-commit/push flows)
Treats this as routine commit work, not periodic cleanup
_notes: Negative trigger — git-ship handles routine commits. repo-cleanup is for periodic batch deletes, not per-task commits. The two were explicitly disambiguated in the description sibling-skill clause.
